name: Kounoupithi Stifado (Cauliflower Stifado)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cauliflower and break into florets.
2. Peel and wash the onions; drain them.
3. Heat the oil in a pot and lightly brown the whole onions.
4. Add garlic and cook until golden.
5. Add diluted tomato paste, vinegar, rosemary, and bay leaf; cook for 30 minutes.
6. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil; add cauliflower.
7. Cook the cauliflower for 5 minutes, then drain and add it to the sauce.
8. If necessary, add a little water.
9. Add peppercorns. Cover the pot.
10. Simmer until all liquid has been absorbed and only the oil remains (about 30 to 45 minutes).
11. Serves 6 to 8.
